name: Four Happiness Meatballs
recipeIngredient: Corn starch mixed with 3 tbsp Water
1 tbsp Soy sauce or to taste
recipeInstructions:
Combine the ingredients for the meatballs. Shape them into 4 large meatballs.
Wash and remove all sandy particles from bok choy. Cut crosswise into 2-inch sections.
Heat 3 tablespoons oil in a wok. Fry 2 meatballs at a time until both sides are brown (about 3 minutes). Remove, then fry the remaining 2 meatballs. Use more oil if frying in a saucepan.
Remove all but 3 tablespoons oil from the wok. Stir-fry vegetables for 1-2 minutes over medium heat. Turn off the heat.
Arrange the stems of the vegetable at the bottom of a casserole dish. Place the meatballs on top, then cover with the leaves of the vegetable.
Add soy sauce, sugar, and sherry; bring to a boil. Simmer on low heat for 30 minutes with the lid on.
Serve hot.
